scripts.start: docker compose -p grenmet --env-file infra/docker/.env.local -f infra/docker/docker-compose.yml --profile tools up -d && docker compose -p grenmet-api --env-file apps/api/fastapi/.env.local -f apps/api/fastapi/docker-compose.yml up
scripts.stop: docker compose -p grenmet-api --env-file apps/api/fastapi/.env.local -f apps/api/fastapi/docker-compose.yml down --remove-orphans && docker compose -p grenmet --env-file infra/docker/.env.local -f infra/docker/docker-compose.yml --profile tools down --remove-orphans
scripts.reset: docker compose -p grenmet --env-file infra/docker/.env.local -f infra/docker/docker-compose.yml --profile tools down -v && docker compose -p grenmet --env-file infra/docker/.env.local -f infra/docker/docker-compose.yml up postgres -d
scripts.status: docker compose -p grenmet --env-file infra/docker/.env.local -f infra/docker/docker-compose.yml --profile tools ps && docker compose -p grenmet-api --env-file apps/api/fastapi/.env.local -f apps/api/fastapi/docker-compose.yml ps
